content.text: Implemented health check support end-to-end. Added `config.healthPath` (default `/health`), updated `handle` to return `{ status: "ok" }` on GET health requests, and added `tests/handler.test.ts` with root/health/404 coverage. Verification passed: `bun test` (3/3) and `bun run typecheck` (clean).
